signup.title: Create Account
signup.description: Create a new account with your first and last name.
signup.passkey_hint: After registration you will receive a verification email. Then you can sign in with a passkey.
signup.success: Account successfully created! Check your email for verification instructions. After email verification you can use the Sign In tab to set up a passkey.
signup.existing_account: An account with this email address already exists. Try signing in or use account recovery.
signup.generic_error: An error occurred while creating your account
signup.network_error: An error occurred while creating your account. Check your internet connection and try again.
signup.already_have_account: Already have an account? Use the Sign In tab.
signup.after_registration: After registration you will receive a verification email. Then use the Sign In tab.

errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.code_expired: Code expired. Request a new code.
errors.code_required: Verification code is required to sign in.
errors.login_failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
errors.credentials_invalid: Sign in failed. Check your credentials.
errors.passkey_cancelled: Passkey authentication cancelled. Please try again.
errors.confirm_required: Your account still needs to be confirmed. Check your email.
errors.resend_failed: Failed to send new code. Please try again.

verification.enter_code: Enter the verification code sent to your email:

info.title: Authentication Information
info.email_intro: You can sign in with your email address
info.email_desc: Enter your email address and choose your preferred sign-in method
info.passkey_desc: Sign in securely with fingerprint, face recognition, or device PIN
info.google_desc: Use your existing Google account to sign in quickly
info.new_user_desc: The system automatically detects if you need a new account
info.help_desc: Set up a new passkey or try Google sign-in
